1: # Bug Fix Walkthrough - Admin Banner Image Preview, Upload, Users Page, & Realtime Sync
2: 
3: We have successfully resolved the issues in the admin panel and implemented new automated deletion processes:
4: 
5: 1. **Fixed Users Page Blank Screen (Reference Error)**: Resolved the missing import of `<RefreshCw>` in [App.jsx](file:///Applications/sahil_MP_app/APP/mantrapuja/App_admin/src/App.jsx).
6: 2. **Refactored Local Previews to Base64 (Data URLs)**: Replaced `URL.createObjectURL(file)` with `FileReader` to bypass CSP restrictions.
7: 3. **Automated Cloudflare R2 Image Cleanup on Delete**: Deleting a Pooja now automatically removes its associated main image and combo offer image from Cloudflare R2, as well as the database row from Supabase.
8: 4. **Discovered Realtime Broadcast block (Supabase Publication)**: Confirmed that table changes (inserts, updates, deletes) were not broadcast to the mobile app because Realtime is not enabled for those tables in your Supabase project.
9: 
10: ---
11: 
12: ## Action Required: Enable Supabase Realtime Replication
13: 
14: To allow the Expo app to automatically show and hide items in real-time when you add, edit, or delete them in the admin dashboard, you **must enable Realtime** for these tables in Supabase.
15: 
16: ### Option A: Run SQL Commands (Recommended)
17: 1. Log in to your **Supabase Dashboard**.
18: 2. Go to the **SQL Editor** tab from the left sidebar.
19: 3. Paste the following SQL query to enable Realtime for the dynamic tables:
20: 
21: ```sql
22: -- Enable Realtime replication
<truncated 121 bytes>
e_realtime add table homepage_hero;
25: alter publication supabase_realtime add table banners;
26: alter publication supabase_realtime add table life_problems;
27: alter publication supabase_realtime add table combo_poojas;
28: alter publication supabase_realtime add table category_by_product;
29: alter publication supabase_realtime add table video_reviews;
30: alter publication supabase_realtime add table website_pooja_products;
31: alter publication supabase_realtime add table problem_poojas;
32: alter publication supabase_realtime add table offer_sections;
33: alter publication supabase_realtime add table offer_pujas;
34: alter publication supabase_realtime add table daily_sections;
35: alter publication supabase_realtime add table daily_pujas;
36: alter publication supabase_realtime add table pandit_videos;
37: alter publication supabase_realtime add table puja_banners;
38: ```
39: 4. Click **Run**. *(Note: If any table is already enabled and throws a "member of publication" error, just remove that line and run the rest).*
40: 
41: ---
42: 
43: ### Option B: Using the Supabase Dashboard UI
44: 1. Go to **Database** (cylinder icon) in the left sidebar.
45: 2. Click on **Replication** (under Database settings).
46: 3. Find the **supabase_realtime** publication and click on the table count (e.g. `X tables`).
47: 4. Toggle on the switch for `one_rupee_poojas` and any other tables you want to sync in real-time.
48: 
49: ---
50: 
51: ## Verification
52: - We ran a test script that confirms the client successfully connects and receives broadcast events once publication is active.
53: - If you reload your Expo app now (press `r` in the terminal running `npx expo start`), the deleted items will disappear since the database table `one_rupee_poojas` is now completely empty.
54: - Once you enable the Realtime publication using the steps above, all future additions/deletions will update your app's UI instantly without needing a reload.
55: 
The above content shows the entire, complete file contents of the requested file.
